name: Harmonic Convergence
short_description: Master the rhythm of combat in this roguelite where attacks must hit on beat! Match inputs to music as you battle through conspiracy hotspots like Government Bases, Bimini Road, and alien worlds. Uncover artifacts, craft game-breaking builds, and uncover the truth behind Harmonic Convergence.
detailed_description:
About This Game

Master the rhythm of combat in this roguelite where attacks must hit on beat! Match inputs to music as you battle through conspiracy hotspots like Government Bases, Bimini Road, and alien worlds. Uncover artifacts, craft game-breaking builds, and uncover the truth behind Harmonic Convergence.

As waves of increasingly bizarre enemies swarm you, you'll need to maintain perfect rhythm while positioning strategically. Think Vampire Survivors meets Dance Dance Revolution.

Core Gameplay

Navigate top-down arenas while matching directional beat inputs to unleash devastating attacks. Your weapons are mapped to the cardinal directions (up, down left, right or gamepad right-thumb buttons), and only precise timing will activate them. Hitting beats on target will increase your combo. A high combo will power-up your weapons, unleashing new powerful or defensive effects.

Explore the Unexplained

Journey through locations that "officially" don't exist:

  • Plagued Desert - Start your journey and find artifacts that belong in a museum!

  • Bimini Road - Navigate prehistoric underwater ruins and battle aquatic anomalies

  • Area 57 - Liberate [REDACTED]-controlled government agents and put a stop to a variety of freakish experiments.

  • [REDACTED] - Where did we come from? Who seeded life throughout our galaxy?

Uncover Ancient Mysteries

Increase your player power with out-of-this-world artifacts inspired by real-world archaeological enigmas. Use your favorite combination of 30+ game-changing augmentations to create your ideal build. Or, weaken yourself for a true challenge.

Key Features

Rhythm-Based Combat - Every action syncs to an original soundtrack
Roguelite Progression - New runs, new characters, new builds, new ways to break reality
Game-Breaking Builds - Combine augmentations in ways that shouldn't be possible to overpower your character.
Audio-First Design - Best experienced with headphones

Issues, questions, concerns, feedback, suggestions? Join the Discord!
